examples: The wind makes mischief for a girl dressed in her festival best in Salta Province in northwestern Argentina.
A female police officer in Salta, Argentina, kissed me on both cheeks.
Salta, a province in the north-west, sounded promising so we decided to make one last push.
Known as Salta, la Linda (Salta, the beautiful one), the city of just 600, 000 residents has a small town community feel.
Year-round mild weather makes Salta an ideal place to walk, as well as a great place to enjoy picnics and drinks outside.
